heading: If life has given us another chance to know each other...
subheading: I simply wanted you to know how special you've become to me.
paragraphs: I don't know where our lives will lead, nor do I want to rush or place any expectations on us. We have only reconnected for a month, yet every chat with you has brought a rare, peaceful joy into my busy days.
You have become my comfort zone—a place where I can speak freely, smile genuinely, and feel at peace. I want to respect your space, your dreams, and your journey in Biotechnology above all else.
If someday our paths continue to walk side by side, I would be the happiest person. But even if we just remain as we are now, I am deeply, truly grateful that our paths crossed again.
This website is just a humble way of saying: I appreciate your existence, I celebrate your achievements, and I'm glad you're in my life. Have a wonderful, blessed birthday, Priyadharshika.
